preferences.fcmTooltip: Available in the Lumenta mobile app
preferences.noChannelHint: In-app notifications are always on. Add a WhatsApp, SMS, or Slack channel below to receive on those.

channels.subtitle: Where your WhatsApp, SMS, and Slack notifications are delivered.
channels.empty: No channels yet. Add one to receive notifications outside the app.

verifyModal.title: Verify channel
verifyModal.description: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your channel.

quietHours.subtitle: Hold non-critical WhatsApp, SMS and Slack notifications during a nightly window. In-app and critical alerts always come through.
quietHours.incomplete: Set a start time, end time and timezone

approved.title: Template approved
approved.body: Your template "{{templateName}}" was approved by WhatsApp and is ready to use.

rejected.title: Template rejected
rejected.body: Your template "{{templateName}}" was rejected by WhatsApp. Review and resubmit it.

flagged.title: Template quality dropped
flagged.body: Your template "{{templateName}}" hit a RED quality score — a tier drop may follow.

paused.title: Template paused
paused.body: Your template "{{templateName}}" was paused by WhatsApp and cannot be sent right now.

connected.title: Sender connected
connected.body: {{senderName}} is connected and ready to send.

disconnected.title: Sender disconnected
disconnected.body: A WhatsApp sender was disconnected and can no longer send messages. Reconnect it in your sender settings.

tier_changed.title: Sender tier changed
tier_changed.body: The messaging tier for {{senderName}} changed from {{oldTier}} to {{newTier}}.

quality_degraded.title: Sender quality degraded
quality_degraded.body: The quality rating of one of your senders dropped. Review its health in your sender settings.

completed.title: Campaign completed
completed.body: Your campaign finished — {{sent}} delivered, {{failed}} failed of {{total}}.

131049_threshold.title: Campaign hitting WhatsApp limits
131049_threshold.body: WhatsApp is limiting delivery for this campaign (error 131049) — many recipients may not receive it. Pause it and review your targeting.

scheduled_reminder.title: Campaign starts soon
scheduled_reminder.body: A scheduled campaign runs in about an hour — cancel it now if you need to.

completed.title: Report ready
completed.body: Your {{reportType}} report is ready to download.

failed.title: Report failed
failed.body: Your {{reportType}} report could not be generated. You can retry it.

published.title: Flow published
published.body: Your flow "{{flowName}}" is now published and live.

invitation_sent.title: Invitation sent
invitation_sent.body: An invitation was sent to {{email}} as {{role}}.

role_changed.title: Your role changed
role_changed.body: Your role in this workspace is now {{role}}.

created.title: API key created
created.body: A new API key "{{keyName}}" was created for this workspace.

expiring_soon.title: API key expiring
expiring_soon.body: API key "{{keyName}}" expires in {{daysRemaining}} days. Rotate it to avoid downtime.

payment_failed.title: Payment failed
payment_failed.body: A payment attempt failed (attempt {{attempt}}). Update your payment method to avoid service interruption.

trial_ending.title: Trial ending soon
trial_ending.body: Your trial ends in {{daysRemaining}} day(s). Choose a plan to keep your account active.

invoice_issued.title: New invoice
invoice_issued.body: A new invoice has been issued for your account.

subscription_suspended.title: Subscription suspended
subscription_suspended.body: Your subscription has been suspended. Resolve billing to restore service.

assigned_to_you.title: Conversation assigned to you
assigned_to_you.body: The conversation with {{clientName}} was assigned to you.

mention.title: {{authorName}} mentioned you
mention.body: {{authorName}} mentioned you in a note on the conversation with {{clientName}}.

sla_breach.title: Conversation awaiting reply
sla_breach.body: {{clientName}} has been waiting more than {{waitedMinutes}} minutes without a reply.

overdue.title: Reminder overdue: {{title}}
overdue.body: "{{title}}" was due {{dueAt}} and is still open.

suggested.title: Follow-up suggested: {{clientName}}
suggested.body: {{clientName}} has been waiting {{waitedMinutes}} min without a reply — we set up "{{title}}" for you.

window_closing.title: Service window closing: {{clientName}}
window_closing.body: The free reply window with {{clientName}} closes in about 2 hours — after that a paid template is needed.

queue_due.title: Unassigned reminder due
queue_due.body: "{{title}}" is due ({{dueAt}}) and nobody has claimed it yet.

security_alert.title: Security alert
security_alert.body: Unusual activity was detected on your account. Review your security settings now.

delivery_unroutable.title: Webhook events can't be routed
delivery_unroutable.body: Incoming WhatsApp events couldn't be matched to any of your senders. Review your sender configuration.

failed.title: Integration failed
failed.body: One of your integrations stopped working. Check its configuration in Settings.

draft_ready.title: Lume drafted a reply
draft_ready.body: Lume drafted a reply to a customer message — review and approve it.

cost_cap_hit.title: Lume cost cap reached
cost_cap_hit.body: Lume hit its {{scope}} spend cap and paused automatic replies. Raise the cap in Billing to resume.

support_notified.title: Lume escalated to support
support_notified.body: Lume could not answer a customer question and notified the Lumenta support team.

trial_exhausted.title: Lume free trial used up
trial_exhausted.body: Your free Lume inquiries are used up. Activate a plan in Billing to keep Lume running.

kb_ingest_failed.title: Knowledge source failed to process
kb_ingest_failed.body: The Lume knowledge source "{{name}}" could not be processed. Open the knowledge base to review it.

topup_succeeded.title: Credit top-up succeeded
topup_succeeded.body: {{amount}} was added to your Codemina credit. New balance: {{balance}}.

topup_failed.title: Auto top-up failed
topup_failed.body: We could not charge your saved card for {{amount}} (attempt {{attempt}}/{{maxAttempts}}). Update your payment method to keep credit flowing.

balance_low.title: Credit balance is low
balance_low.body: Your Codemina credit balance ({{balance}}) is below your alert threshold ({{threshold}}). Top up to keep things running.

balance_zero.title: Credit balance is zero
balance_zero.body: Your Codemina credit balance is empty. Overages will roll onto your next invoice (or block sending if you opted in).

admin_grant.title: Credit added to your account
admin_grant.body: Lumenta granted you {{amount}} of credit. New balance: {{balance}}.

admin_clawback.title: Credit removed from your account
admin_clawback.body: Lumenta removed {{amount}} of credit. New balance: {{balance}}.

debit_summary.title: Credit applied to your invoice
debit_summary.body: {{amount}} of credit was applied to your {{period}} usage. Remaining balance: {{balance}}.

refund_issued.title: Credit top-up refunded
refund_issued.body: A refund of {{amount}} was issued against a previous top-up. New balance: {{balance}}.

account_suspended.title: Account suspended
account_suspended.body: Your account was suspended for a compliance violation. Sending is disabled. Contact support@lumenta.co for reactivation.

account_reactivated.title: Account reactivated
account_reactivated.body: Your account has been reactivated. Sending is enabled again.

send_blocked.title: Sending blocked
send_blocked.body: A message could not be sent because your account is suspended for a compliance violation.
